title: impatiens macrovexilla var. yaoshanensis
intro: Impatiens macrovexilla var. yaoshanensis, also known as Yaoshan balsam, is a plant species in the balsam family that is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can also be made into a tincture or dried for later use in teas and other remedies.
